description: Direct relationship edge contract for customer, supplier, contract, partner, shipment, news, and sector exposure rows.

mainline_promotion_rules.direct_customer_supplier: Must have explicit counterparty, direction, source evidence, and verifier_status=verified.
mainline_promotion_rules.contractual_relationship: Can support contract/relationship facts, but not financial metrics.
mainline_promotion_rules.partner_channel: Must not be rewritten as customer or supplier.
mainline_promotion_rules.shipment_inferred: Lead only; must not be rewritten as durable supplier/customer relationship.
mainline_promotion_rules.news_reported: Lead only unless separately verified by official source.
